positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a celestial forest at twilight. Silhouettes of diverse, fantastical trees with glowing, ethereal canopies reach into a swirling lavender and indigo sky. A crescent moon hangs centered, illuminating a stylized, meandering river. The overall mood is magical and serene. Focus on high contrast, clean vector lines, deep jewel tones mixed with luminous pastels, designed with a central, symmetrical composition suitable for a t-shirt print. Flat, clean graphic style, perfect for screen printing.
negative: low detail, artifact, blurry, noise, text, watermark, logo, messy, graffiti, bad anatomy, extra limbs, realistic photography, 3d render, bokeh
